allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(reearth/dev\): use reearth-classic-account as REEARTH_DB_ACCOUNT in dev

Dev environment should use a separate account database \(reearth-classic-account\)
to avoid MongoDB schema validation conflicts. Prod remains reearth-account.

- Add reearth_db_account variable to reearth_classic_api module \(default: reearth-account\)
- Set reearth_db_account to reearth-classic-account in dev reearth_classic_api
- Set databases.account to reearth-classic-account in dev reearth_cloud

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(reearth/dev\): grant reearth role access to reearth-classic-account database

The classic API uses reearth-classic-account as DB_Account, but the
reearth custom DB role only had permissions for reearth and
reearth-account databases, causing MongoDB Unauthorized errors on
user lookups during authentication.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(reearth/dev\): add reearth-classic-db role and revert reearth role

- Revert the reearth custom role to remove reearth-classic-account
  \(the reearth-db secret uses reearth-visualizer user, not reearth\)
- Add new reearth-classic-db custom role with access to reearth and
  reearth-classic-account databases for the classic API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
